demo.title: gem-miner.sh
demo.code:
# Check staking position and unclaimed rewards
bankr "on Base, call balanceOf(address), earned(address), and pendingOf(address) on 0xff293DEc665949a3a1a80fBA6a602da3be702C1A with my wallet"

# Stake 25M GEM (gate minimum) — approve then stake
bankr "on Base, approve 0xff293DEc665949a3a1a80fBA6a602da3be702C1A to spend 25000000000000000000000000 of token 0xD3776969966B340d72d75731eF890A3Bc9F21bA3, then call stake(uint256) on 0xff293DEc665949a3a1a80fBA6a602da3be702C1A with 25000000000000000000000000"

# Claim accrued rewards without unstaking
bankr "on Base, call getReward() on 0xff293DEc665949a3a1a80fBA6a602da3be702C1A"

setup: Requires `bankr` configured with a wallet holding $GEM and ETH for gas on Base
